perks.summary: preprocess (impute + scale + one-hot) a CSV, compare LogReg/RandomForest/GradientBoosting by 5-fold CV, tune the best with GridSearchCV, and report test metrics + feature importances
find the optimal K for K-Means over a range via inertia (elbow) + silhouette score, save an elbow/silhouette plot, and report the recommended K
scale a CSV and compare K-Means, Agglomerative, Gaussian Mixture, and DBSCAN, scoring each with silhouette, Calinski-Harabasz, and Davies-Bouldin
project a scaled CSV to 2D with PCA, K-Means-label it, and render a labeled scatter plot of the clusters
